title: Why Does My Camera Do That
description: Adds new keybinds to quickly toggle third person views
body:
This is a simple __CLIENTSIDE__ mod that adds 2 new keybinds that allow you to hold them down to quickly toggle third-person's front and back sides.

 

By default (these can be changed in vanilla key bind menu):


"x" toggles the front side

"c" toggles the back side
